what: Call backend export flow and stream progress via SSE
why: The backend reads all knowledge entries and writes them as .md files to the destination

transitions.on_error: show error state with retry option

success_handling.criteria: Backend exports all entries and the SSE completed event is received with total exported count
success_handling.transition: show done state with exported count and destination path

error_handling.description: Backend failed to write one or more files — show error count and allow retry
Backend is unreachable — show generic network error with retry option
